subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath exalted His House unto such a station that the Concourse on High and the denizens of the Kingdom of Names circle round it, and hath made it the focal point [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی رفع بیته الی مقام زاره الملا الاعلی و اهل ملکوت الاسماء و جعله مقبل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @the power of words; of speech, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the concourse on high, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
